prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find all C++ source files in envoyproxy/envoy that handle HTTP/1.1 to HTTP/2 header translation: the header case normalization (lowercase), the pseudo-header injection (:method, :path, :scheme, :authority), and the upgrade header handling.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the envoy-service-mesh fixture.
